note: Last 10 received in the Primary inbox. Two new overnight/morning marketing emails (Barça Innovation Hub, Training Ground Guru), Apple account/security alerts, and WME Payroll replies about your 2025 W-2.

emails.subject: Let's keep growing together — 40% off for alumni
emails.snippet: As an alumnus, this season scholarship is waiting for you.

emails.subject: Live on Monday: How elite players tactically prepare for opponents
emails.snippet: Dear Premium Member, we have a Masterclass on Monday at 7pm UK: Individual Tactical Preparation with Alec Tate, fresh from the World Cup with FIFA.

emails.subject: Thanks for submitting your support request.
emails.snippet: We've received your support request and will get back to you as soon as possible. Case ID 102949494914. — Apple Developer Program Support

emails.subject: Your Apple Account information has been updated.
emails.snippet: The following changes to your Apple Account were made on July 22, 2026: email address(es). If you did not make these changes...

emails.subject: Verify your email address.
emails.snippet: You recently added jackbuckiingham@gmail.com as an additional email address for your Apple Account. Enter the code below to verify.

emails.subject: Get the Support Your Business Needs to Thrive
emails.snippet: Hi Jackson, forming an LLC can be intimidating, but you don't need to do it alone. Form your LLC today.

emails.subject: Accept your invitation to join shared calendar: "Jack Buckingham"
emails.snippet: Jack Buckingham has invited you to see all event details on the calendar "Jack Buckingham". Accept the invite to join.

emails.subject: RE: W2 for 2025
emails.snippet: Hello Jack — you can access your W2 through ADP iPay. Please follow the steps below to register your account.

emails.subject: Missing Football Already? The Top Leagues Are Back!
emails.snippet: The leagues are back for 2026/27. Grab the best seats at the best price before everyone else does.

emails.subject: Re: W-2 Request For 2025
emails.snippet: Hello Jack: Please reach out to Payroll@WMEAgency.com to assist with your query. Thank you. — Cara Carroll, WME
